title: Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup

seo.title: How to Make Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup — Easy Turkish Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup. This easy Turkish recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

easy Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup recipe
authentic Turkish Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup

seo.imageAlt: Authentic Turkish Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup — a beloved Turkish classic

description: Mercimek Corbasi is a comforting and flavorful red lentil soup, a true staple in Turkish cuisine. This hearty soup is renowned for its smooth, creamy texture and vibrant color, often enhanced with a special butter and paprika drizzle. It's a perfect dish for any meal, offering warmth and a taste of authentic Turkish hospitality.

instructions.title: Prepare Lentils and Aromatics
instructions.text: Rinse the red lentils thoroughly under cold running water until the water runs clear. In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat a tablespoon of olive oil or butter over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and diced carrot, cooking until softened, about 5-7 minutes.

instructions.title: Add Garlic and Tomato Paste
instructions.text: Stir in the minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant. Add the tomato paste and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, to deepen its flavor and color.

instructions.title: Combine and Simmer
instructions.text: Add the rinsed red lentils and vegetable or chicken broth to the pot. Stir well. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are very tender and have mostly broken down.

instructions.title: Season and Blend
instructions.text: Once the lentils are tender, remove the pot from the heat. Stir in the dried mint, salt, and black pepper. Use an immersion blender to blend the soup directly in the pot until it is smooth and creamy. If you dont have an immersion blender, carefully transfer the soup in batches to a regular blender and blend until smooth, then return to the pot.

instructions.title: Prepare the Butter Drizzle
instructions.text: While the soup is simmering or after blending, prepare the special Turkish butter drizzle. In a small saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over medium-low heat. Once the butter is melted and slightly foamy, stir in the red pepper flakes (Pul Biber). Cook for about 30 seconds, being careful not to burn the spices.

instructions.title: Serve Mercimek Corbasi
instructions.text: Ladle the hot Mercimek Corbasi into bowls. Drizzle a spoonful of the spiced butter over each serving. Serve immediately with fresh lemon wedges on the side, allowing each person to squeeze lemon juice into their soup for an extra burst of flavor.

tips: For a truly authentic flavor, dont skip the final butter and red pepper flake drizzle. It adds a crucial aromatic and visual element to the soup.
Always rinse your red lentils thoroughly. This removes starches and ensures a clearer, better-tasting soup, preventing it from becoming overly cloudy or gummy.
Mercimek Corbasi thickens as it cools. If you have leftovers, you might need to add a splash of hot water or broth when reheating to achieve the desired consistency.
article: Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup is a beloved Turkish Soups and Stews dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
